title: Business Development Manager
description:
Opportunity

We are seeking a results-driven Business Development Manager to drive growth and expand our logistics business. This role is ideal for a proactive professional with a strong understanding of 3PL, 4PL, or freight forwarding solutions, who can identify new business opportunities, build lasting client relationships, and contribute to the company’s strategic objectives.

Key Responsibilities

  •  Identify and pursue new business opportunities in the logistics and supply chain sector
  •  Develop and maintain relationships with key decision-makers at potential and existing clients
  •  Respond to RFQs, tenders, and commercial inquiries in a timely manner
  •  Prepare and present proposals, quotations, and commercial offers
  •  Collaborate with operations, pricing, and customer service teams to deliver tailored logistics solutions
  •  Maintain an accurate sales pipeline and forecast using CRM tools
  •  Analyze market trends, competitor activity, and customer needs to identify growth opportunities
  •  Achieve or exceed revenue and business development targets
  •  Represent the company at industry events, customer meetings, and networking activities

Qualifications & Experience

  •  Bachelor’s degree in Business, Logistics, Supply Chain, or related field
  •  5–7 years of experience in business development, sales, or commercial roles within logistics, freight forwarding, 3PL, or 4PL
  •  Proven track record of winning new business and managing key accounts
  •  Strong knowledge of logistics services, supply chain solutions, and freight operations
  •  Experience handling RFQs, tenders, and long sales cycles
  •  Excellent negotiation, presentation, and communication skills
  •  Ability to work independently and collaboratively in a fast-paced environment
  •  Proficient in Microsoft Office and CRM systems

Why Join Us?

  •  Opportunity to play a key role in growing a dynamic logistics company
  •  Exposure to multi-modal logistics solutions and international supply chains
  •  Competitive salary with performance-based incentives
  •  Career growth opportunities in business development, sales, or account management
  •  Collaborative and supportive working environment
  •  Chance to make a measurable impact on business performance

postedCompany.description: EVEREFFICIENT MOVERS PTE LTD is successfully running from sep'2022 onwards, and we are specialized in all kinds of materials moving services by land and we support implementation of projects handover, and well experience in all area logistics operating with providing various solution for logistics customers.
